hero.title: Florence, Alabama's Vibrant Music & Dining Scene
hero.subtitle: Discover the heart of the Tennessee Valley's live music and culinary hotspots

heritage.title: Florence's Music & Entertainment Hub
heritage.description: Florence, Alabama is home to a thriving live music scene and award-winning restaurants. Nestled in Alabama's historic Shoals region near the Tennessee River, Florence offers an exceptional blend of Southern hospitality, world-class entertainment, and culinary excellence. Whether you're catching live performances at local venues or dining at celebrated restaurants, Florence delivers authentic experiences in the heart of the Tennessee Valley.

footer.aboutText: Florence is Alabama's music and entertainment destination in the Shoals region, offering premier dining and live music experiences.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Florence, Alabama - Music & Dining. All rights reserved.
